Tests for the Math.atan2 function with various input values, including NaN, zero, infinity, and specific numbers.


## Files
- **[15.08.02.05-001.js](15.08.02.05-001.js.md)**: Tests the Math.atan2 function with NaN as the first argument to ensure it returns NaN.
